howToPlay.title: How to Play
howToPlay.whatIsBlackjackDesc: A classic casino card game where you compete against the dealer.
howToPlay.yourObjectiveDesc: Get as close to 21 as possible without going over.
howToPlay.hitToReceive: Tap HIT to receive another card
howToPlay.standToKeep: Tap STAND to keep your current hand
howToPlay.doubleToDouble: Tap DOUBLE to double your bet and receive one card
howToPlay.splitToSplit: Tap SPLIT to split your pair into two hands

blackjack.goalBody: Get closer to 21 than the dealer. Go over 21 and you lose instantly.
blackjack.cardValuesBody: 2–10 = face value. J, Q, K = 10. Ace = 1 or 11 — whichever helps you more.
blackjack.roundBody: Place a bet. Get 2 cards. Choose to hit or stand. Then the dealer plays.
blackjack.hitStandBody: Hit = take another card. Stand = keep what you have.
blackjack.blackjackBody: Ace + any 10-value card = Blackjack. It pays 3:2 on your bet.
blackjack.dealerRulesBody: The dealer must hit until reaching 17 or higher. No choices involved.
blackjack.doubleDownBody: Double your bet and get exactly one more card. Best when you have 10 or 11.
blackjack.splittingBody: Got two of the same card? Split them into two hands. Costs another bet.
blackjack.hardSoftBody: A soft hand has an Ace counting as 11. You can't bust on your next hit.
blackjack.bustingBody: Go over 21 and you bust — instant loss. The dealer doesn't even play.
blackjack.pushBody: Same total as the dealer = push. You get your bet back.
blackjack.easyHitExplanation: Hit. You can't bust and need to improve.
blackjack.standStrongExplanation: Stand. 19 is strong and the dealer is likely to bust.
blackjack.tough16Explanation: Hit. 16 loses most of the time if you stand.
blackjack.double11Explanation: Double. This is one of the best spots — you're favored to win big.
blackjack.split8sExplanation: Split. 16 is a terrible hand, but two 8s give you a fresh start.
blackjack.neverSplit10sExplanation: Stand. 20 is nearly unbeatable — don't break it up.
blackjack.soft18Explanation: Hit. Soft 18 vs 9 is actually an underdog — try to improve.
blackjack.surrenderExplanation: Surrender if allowed. Save half your bet in a losing spot.
blackjack.tipInsuranceBody: Insurance is a side bet with a big house edge. Always decline it.
blackjack.tipAcesEightsBody: Always split Aces and 8s. No exceptions, regardless of the dealer's card.
blackjack.tipBasicStrategyBody: A simple chart tells you the best move for every hand. Memorize it.
blackjack.tipBankrollBody: Set a session budget. Bet 2–5% per hand. Walk away at your limit.
blackjack.quizTotalQuestion: You have K + 7. What's your total?
blackjack.quiz13vs6Question: You have 13, dealer shows 6. What do you do?
blackjack.quiz13vs6Explanation: Stand. The dealer is likely to bust with a 6 showing.
blackjack.quizSplitAcesQuestion: You have A-A vs dealer 8. What do you do?
blackjack.quizSplitAcesExplanation: Split. Two chances at 21 beats a total of 12.
blackjack.quiz12vs2Question: You have 12, dealer shows 2. What do you do?
blackjack.quiz12vs2Explanation: Hit. 12 vs 2 is slightly better to hit — the dealer isn't weak enough to stand.
